title: Minecraft: Chaos Overgrowth
description: A modpack that introduces three deadly infections that will overtake the world, unleashing chaos and darkness unless you uncover their secrets and destroy them in time.
body:
![Modpack banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13ec097b30e7117c6004350b82d1013964a556ad.png)

## **⚠️Fight for your life as three terrifying infections consume the world, bringing unimaginable horrors and chaos at every turn.⚠️**

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3dbef30eba8d918db5c2ee2a030ca7a62943251.png)

- ✔️ **Quests**
- ✔️ **Sculk infection!**
- ✔️ **Flesh Infection!**
- ✔️ **Spore Infection!**
- ✔️ **Qol mods**
- ✔️ **Dungeons!**
- ✔️ **New structures**
- ✔️ **Backpacks**
- ✔️ **New movement**
- ✔️ **Guns!**
- ✔️ **Optimized with shader support**


### _Need a server? Use code "Hugo0272" for discount_

[![Partner Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b1954792c636296daf42c4c382e393c3a26168.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=357)
